skills sheet · v1.0 · 2026.05

Danilo Rojas Senior Product Designer · Agentic / AI Product Design

Quito · Ecuador
EN professional · ES native
Remote global

Eighteen years in product, fifteen in design. Senior UX judgment, user psychology mapping, and the system design capability to align complex product architectures into frictionless user experiences — AI-augmented research as leverage. From DBA to UX — I learned the whole stack to design for it. I analyze, learn, ship, and align to whatever the project needs.

18+
Years building products
26
Teams adopted my design system at Booz Allen — from zero
6→1
Design-to-development cycle, in weeks — production-ready React
3.6×
New-user activation after an onboarding rebuild (2.6% → 9.4%, Mixpanel)

How I work

generated from repo
/perfil/data/skills.yaml
01 Current work
Senior Product Designer · Design-Engineering
Army · DoD · VA · FAA

Booz Allen Hamilton

Lead product designer for federal systems under the Trusted Environments umbrella, architecting two design systems (Shadcn, Radix, BAH Brand Book) compliant with WCAG 2.2 and Section 508 — passing 95%+ of automated accessibility checks. Pioneered agentic UX research: built LLM-based persona emulators to run moderated usability testing (5 users per feature), with 92% rating the resulting improvements better. Designed a custom MCP for developers; the design system scaled from 0 to 26 internal teams at Booz Allen Hamilton, including the Vellox Reverser cybersecurity product.

User research Design systems Agentic UX testing WCAG 2.2 / Section 508 Custom MCP DoD · FAA · VA
Lead Product Designer
280+ paying users

Compliance SaaS · LATAM

Lead product designer for a compliance SaaS for LATAM SMBs, owning discovery-to-launch design and shipping a validated MVP in 40 days. Designed a 31-component Figma design system, used across 16 screens and implemented directly in React/TypeScript. Ran AI-persona feedback loops to validate onboarding flows pre-engineering, growing the product to ~280 paying customers on a base of ~2,700 total users.

Product discovery Design systems Figma React 19 TypeScript Supabase
